statement_html:
Soit \(\mathrm{M}\) le point d'abscisse \(x\) sur la droite graduée d'origine \(\mathrm{O}\).
\draw{800,64}{xrange -16,16 yrange -3,3 hline 0,0,red arrow 15,0,16,0,15,red parallel -15,-0.2,-15,0.2,1,0,5,blue parallel -10,-0.4,-10,0.4,5,0,5,blue parallel -9,-0.2,-9,0.2,1,0,4,blue parallel -4,-0.2,-4,0.2,1,0,4,blue parallel 1,-0.2,1,0.2,1,0,4,blue parallel 6,-0.2,6,0.2,1,0,4,blue parallel 11,-0.2,11,0.2,1,0,5,blue text red,-0.1,1.5,medium,O text red,0+random(-15+(\i-1)*4 .. -15+\i*4-1)*1-0.1,1.5,medium,A,B,C,D,E,F[6[\i]] text red,0+random(-15+(\i-1)*4 .. -15+\i*4-1)*1-0.1,-1,medium,random(-15+(\i-1)*4 .. -15+\i*4-1) segment 0+random(-15+(\i-1)*4 .. -15+\i*4-1)*1,-0.2,0+random(-15+(\i-1)*4 .. -15+\i*4-1)*1,0.2,red text red,0+-1*(random(-15+(\i-1)*4 .. -15+\i*4-1))*1-0.1,1.5,medium,A,B,C,D,E,F[6[\i+6/2]] text red,0+-1*(random(-15+(\i-1)*4 .. -15+\i*4-1))*1-0.1,-1,medium,-1*(random(-15+(\i-1)*4 .. -15+\i*4-1)) segment 0+-1*(random(-15+(\i-1)*4 .. -15+\i*4-1))*1,-0.2,0+-1*(random(-15+(\i-1)*4 .. -15+\i*4-1))*1,0.2,red}
Associer les valeurs absolues aux distances auxquelles elles correspondent.

answers.expected: wims(append item randomitem(MA,B,C,D,E,F[6[\i+6/2]],A,B,C,D,E,F[6[\i+6/2]]M) to wims(append item randomitem(MA,B,C,D,E,F[6[\i]],A,B,C,D,E,F[6[\i]]M) to ));wims(append item randomitem(\(\left|x-(-1\cdot (random(-15+(\i-1)\cdot 4 .. -15+\i\cdot 4-1)))\right|),\(\left|(-1\cdot (random(-15+(\i-1)\cdot 4 .. -15+\i\cdot 4-1)))-x\right|),\(\left|-x+(-1\cdot (random(-15+(\i-1)\cdot 4 .. -15+\i\cdot 4-1)))\right|),\(\left|-(-1\cdot (random(-15+(\i-1)\cdot 4 .. -15+\i\cdot 4-1)))+x\right|)) to wims(append item randomitem(\(\left|x-(random(-15+(\i-1)\cdot 4 .. -15+\i\cdot 4-1))\right|),\(\left|(random(-15+(\i-1)\cdot 4 .. -15+\i\cdot 4-1))-x\right|),\(\left|-x+(random(-15+(\i-1)\cdot 4 .. -15+\i\cdot 4-1))\right|),\(\left|-(random(-15+(\i-1)\cdot 4 .. -15+\i\cdot 4-1))+x\right|)) to ))
